reviews.title: Perfect for camping and getting dirty
reviews.body: These Crocs are great, especially for camping and outdoor use. They’re lightweight, comfortable, and super easy to slip on and off, which makes them ideal around a campsite or when you’re in and out of the tent. What really stands out is how water-friendly and easy to clean they are. You can get them muddy, wet, or covered in dirt and just rinse them off and they’re good to go again. The ventilation holes also help them dry quickly, which is perfect for messy environments. Pros • Very comfortable and lightweight • Great for wet, muddy, or dirty conditions • Easy to clean and quick to dry • Simple slip-on design Cons • None so far Overall, these are perfect for camping and any situation where you don’t want to worry about your shoes getting trashed. I’d definitely buy them again.

reviews.title: Bubblegumalicious
reviews.body: The moment I slid my feet into those bubblegum beauties, it was over. Soft. Cushioned. Hugging every curve like they’ve been waiting all their life to cradle my arches. That foam? Plush. Supportive. A little squishy in all the right places. I swear they don’t just fit — they embrace. And the color? That bold, unapologetic pink doesn’t whisper. It struts. It demands attention. It says, “Yes, I’m comfortable. Yes, I look ridiculous. And yes, I’m thriving.” Every step feels like I’m walking on a flirty little cloud that refuses to be subtle. Let’s not ignore sport mode. Flip that strap back and suddenly we’re locked in. Secure. Committed. Ready to get a little wild in the grocery store aisle. These babies can handle quick turns, power walks, and dramatic exits without slipping off like some shy little sandal. Breathable? Those holes are working overtime, keeping things cool while looking… scandalously ventilated. Functional and fabulous. Pink Crocs aren’t just shoes. They’re a lifestyle choice. They’re comfort with confidence. They’re “I know what I’m about” energy in foam form.

reviews.title: They hit this item out the park😊
reviews.body: I bought this item as a gift & the person really likes them & wondered why they never got a pair before now! They liked everything about them. The fit, the color & the quality. The ease of just sliding in them was a plus!! The material isn’t rough & not harmful to the feet!

reviews.title: My New Favorite Shoes!
reviews.body: I finally understand the hype around Crocs! The Classic Clogs are incredibly comfortable, lightweight, and perfect for all-day wear. I love that they’re unisex, so anyone can rock them, and the fit is true to size. They’re easy to slip on and off, and the material feels soft yet durable. I’ve worn them around the house, for errands, and even outside, and they’ve held up beautifully. Plus, they’re super easy to clean—just rinse and go! Whether you’re looking for comfort, practicality, or just a fun pair of everyday shoes, these Crocs are a must-have. I honestly might never take them off!

reviews.title: Nice enough product, but don't order your first pair online
reviews.body: The shoes themselves are comfortable, durable (so far), easy to clean, everything that you'd expect from the description. I went from a Crocs-hater to an appreciater. But don't order online until you're familiar with the sizing. The manufacturer doesn't offer half-sizes, Amazon recommends ordering a size down if you're in-between, and supposedly the shoes will stretch a bit with use... but in practice that did not work for us. If you have wide feet, or any issues with foot/toe swelling, it definitely makes sense to try the shoes on in-person first. Even wearing socks can make a big difference, because the rubber material is high-friction and doesn't allow "slipping in" easily. I eventually ended up with two pairs in different sizes, rotated seasonally based on weather (socks) and foot health. If you have a local sporting-goods chain beginning with "D" and rhyming with "Kicks", buy your first pair there, where you can try them on (and support the local employees)... then use Amazon for repeat purchases (since Amazon is currently about $15 cheaper). 5 stars for the product, 3 stars for ordering online.

reviews.title: Super comfortable and perfect for everyday use
reviews.body: I absolutely love these Crocs! They are incredibly comfortable and lightweight, making them perfect for everyday wear. I can walk in them for hours without any discomfort. The material feels durable and easy to clean, which is a huge plus. They also fit true to size and have great ventilation, so my feet don’t get too hot. Overall, I’m very happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend them!

reviews.title: Comfortable Crocs
reviews.body: Very comfortable. I wear a women's size 9 and I originally ordered a size up (per their recommendation) I had to return them because they were too big. I exchanged for a size 9 (my true size) and they fit really well with and without socks. With socks they still fit well. Without socks they feel a bit loose, if they had half sizes the fit would probably be perfect. I dont wear the attached strap around the back and the Crocs and they do not slip off. I recommend these Crocks.

reviews.title: The perfect food & beverage work shoe . . .
reviews.body: After spending about $100 a year of crappy work shoes (two pairs a year) offered by the grocery store where I work, I found these to be much more durable, comfortable, affordable, and altogether better work shoe. They meet industry standards for non slip sole, and a heel. If you are food service and work in a bar, kitchen, or in a service dept. at grocery store, these are the bees knees. The material (what crocs are made out off) is very supportive and comfy. They have a reasonably higher arch than most crocs, a beaded massaging interior for comfort that rocks. Also, they have the highest standard of slip resistant soles available, as well as a heel strap that constitutes a heel to meet industry regulations. The are all one piece, so the shoe's layers will not come apart with wear and tear. They is no cloth, absorbent material to hold sweat, and they can be cleaned with bleach and water for sanitation. Obviously the are anti-microbial. These crocs are super comfortable and don't flatten out.(I weigh about 275 - 5'11, and my feet do not swell, and ache after work.) 2 pairs of crocs cost me around $60 in 18 months, vs $100 every 12 months for two crappy pairs of a work "recommended" brand. $50 savings and a much better product than what I use to use for work. These are perfect in every way. They have saved me money, about $50 a year.(I replace them only because the slip resistant sole wears down around the edges) (MORE ABOUT THAT WORN SOLE IN THE SIZING INFO IN THE LAST PARAGRAPH!!) They have increased my comfort for long shifts at work. (9-12 hours on my feet) They don't hold odor, and can be cleaned with bleach and water without impunity. They shoe CAN NOT fall apart, because it is molding into a single piece minus the heel strap, (no layers to come apart) They last a very long time, are roomy, and water proof. They can be worn with or without socks. All in all, these crocks are the shiznitt!!! One thing to note, the run a little large compared to regular shoe size, and there are no half sizes. So, If you wear an 11.5 in a regular shoe, and still have a little wiggle room in the toe, get the size 11 in the croc. If you are closer to a 12 in a regular shoe, then get the 12. Round out the size of the croc you purchase based on how close you are to the whole size in your regular shoe size. Even with that being said, I am over 11.5 in my regular shoe size, closer to a 12, but in the crocs size 12 are just a little to big. The length is right, but it is slightly to large, as my heel drags in the 12 size croc. I got the size 11 croc, and it is perfectly sized. These crocks are almost like buying a flip flop size. There is a lot of wiggle room either way because the heel strap is flexible. If they are a little to large, you can wear them, but the heels will probably drag when you walk. This is why I had to replace my first pair, the heel wore out because they were slightly to large and the heel would drag. To sum it up, I wear a size 12 in a regular shoe, but wear a men's size 11 croc, and it is perfect. My toe has just a bit off wiggle room in my regular shoe size of 12, and has just a little wiggle room in a size 11 croc. Lastly, I hope you enjoy your bistro crocs, as much as I enjoy wearing and talking about mine!!! Now, "get back to work, ya shmoe!!!"

reviews.title: De escéptica a fan total! La comodidad es insuperable
reviews.body: Si hace un tiempo me hubieran dicho que sería mi segundo par, no lo creería. Antes no me gustaban porque sentía que no me lucían, pero desde que me decidí a probar el primero, los amé tanto que ya no me los quito. Por eso mismo acabo de ordenar este segundo par. Lo que debes saber: • Comodidad al 100%: Si buscas un zapato cómodo, esto es lo mejor del mundo. Puede que no sean zapatos de "lujo", pero para el uso diario son lo máximo. Yo los uso para casi todo. • Mantenimiento fácil: Me encanta lo sencillos que son de lavar y lo rápido que se secan. Siempre están listos para usar. • Tip importante: En mi experiencia, corren grandes. Yo normalmente uso talla 8.5, pero en ambos pares he pedido la talla 8 y me quedan perfectos. Recomiendo bajar media talla para un ajuste ideal. En resumen, no tengo palabras para describir lo prácticos que son. Si buscas descanso para tus pies, no lo dudes. ¡Valen totalmente la pena! reviews.title: Wish there were other dark feminine colors
reviews.body: They seemed like a darker green than I expected. More of a hunter green over a true green. More of a manly color. However I wanted a darker color becuase I like that the darker colors hide scuffs and dirty footbeds. They're fairly stiff and hard for the first several months wearing, especially after having my old crocs for years. However, the are softening now and I wear them everywhere. I had pain in the ball of my foot (probably just due to aging) and these were the only shoes that gave me relief AND after wearing Crocs exclusively for about 6 months the pain is pretty much gone. Love my Crocs. The picture shows them looking a little teal but they're definitely not.

You can wear then in first gear or second, throw them in the sink or was em out side with a water hose for an easy clean. All round good quality shoes. You wanna go to the beach? You wanna go skipping g in mud puddles? You want to walk over the unholy ground of your Lego invader? Then these be the shoes for you.

reviews.title: Crocs are the best!
reviews.body: I bought the black, size 8 Classic Croc. I wear a 7 1/2 wide shoe. The last pair was also an 8 and I notice these are a little bit smaller in length, but they fit just right. AND, black goes with everything! If you are on your feet all day long, these are a must have. The little bumps in the bottom massage your feet when you walk. The more you wear them the more comfortable they are. They are easy to clean...just use soap and water, then let them dry. I keep mine looking new and protected using Armor All Spray. Just don't spray the soles LOL) New they are slip resistant. If you have worn the treads smooth, be careful on wet surfaces --- then it's time to buy new ones, for real. Good quality...just replaced the same ones that were 10 years old. AND, the price was exactly the same. Been wearing Crocs since they hit the market in 2002! A wonderful product. Thank you Crocs and Thank You Amazon for selling them. One person found this helpful

reviews.title: Crocs are the best
reviews.body: Love the Crocs brand. We have tired the generic ones and they are not the same. Croc fit is superior and easy to slip on. The shoe is sturdy and long lasting. I was a little skeptical with the uni-sex sizing however, the sizing was spot on and allows room for a wide foot in the toe box. The sole handles the outside wear and tear of dirt and gravel and the upper part has ventilation holes while still protecting your feet. They are also good for casual wear, a day at the beach, or on the river. To clean them just rinse off with water. I use a hose, and if super dirty add a little soap. We are pleased with these Crocs. When it finally dawned on her mom that she was talking about Crocs she just started laughing and told her daughter that they were crockery crocks, not shoes. Of course my sister told me, so in order to pull my niece’s chain I absolutely had to send her a pair of Crocs. I picked my favorite color (teal). When she opened the box she sent us both a text telling us how mean we were, but she said that whenever she sees them she laughs. Just as my sister, when getting something from her crocks laughs.

reviews.body: I had fell and hit hard on my knee. In the healing, my leg and foot swelled and I had the foot xrayed. The doctor told me to buy a good crocs shoes and wear them at first around the house to get used to them. Crocs was very helpful in my healing process as they did not let my toes bend when I walked. reviews.title: I would purchase again
reviews.body: My first pair of Crocs. I have narrow, slim, long-toed feet size 7.5. After doing a lot of research, I got these in an 8. At first, my feet were swimming in them, even with socks. I placed them in the dryer for about 3 minutes and now they're perfect, hug my foot, are very cozy and feel like walking on a cloud. I made the right choice in going up instead of down to a 7. Just be careful if you try to shrink them in the dryer; check them every minute. When they're where you want them to be, let them cool slightly, wear them and they'll mould to your foot. Nice arch support and very lightweight. The pale, mineral blue is a beautiful ice blue colour. Very pleased with these and would buy again!

reviews.title: 30 March, 2026
reviews.body: I didn’t choose Crocs. Crocs chose me. At first, it was innocent. “Just something to slip on,” I said. “Only for quick errands,” I lied. Fast forward to today, and I now measure all other footwear by a single, unforgiving standard: Are you as comfortable as my Crocs? (Spoiler: you are not.) My Crocs are there for me in ways people simply aren’t. Rain? Crocs. Sun? Crocs. Emotional turmoil? Crocs. I have worn them to take out the trash, pick up kids, walk the dog, and make major life decisions. If society would allow it, I’d wear them to weddings, and honestly, I think the bride would understand. They offer the aerodynamics of a race car, the ventilation of a luxury condo, and the fashion audacity of someone who has truly achieved inner peace. Every hole is a reminder that I value comfort over your opinion. And don’t get me started on sport mode. Strap engaged? I am unstoppable. I could hike a mountain. I could chase a dream. I could jog for three seconds and feel proud. Are they ugly? That’s not the question. The question is: Why are you still suffering in narrow, judgmental shoes when Crocs exist? My feet have never felt more seen, more supported, more free to spread out and live their truth. In conclusion, Crocs are not footwear they are a lifestyle, a philosophy, a cry for help that somehow worked out. I love my Crocs, and if that’s wrong, I don’t want to be right.

reviews.title: 24 July, 2024
reviews.body: Don't leave in hot car I love my crocs. I have a pair of lined crocs that helped me survive a day at Knotts Berry Farm while I was suffering from plantar fasciitis. I have a solid pair of crocs and these Baya crocs. They are great, but do not leave them in a car for an extended period of time during the summer. As you can see in the picture, the left one shrunk. It was left in my car for over ten days during the summer heat. I had been wearing a walking boot and left the croc in the car in case I needed it. When I went to use it, I noticed that it had shrunk. Very sad! Guess I'll need a new pair. 🫤

reviews.body: Everyone needs glitter in their life! I already owned the silver glitter Baya Clog, so of course I had to have the black too. The Baya is more comfortable to me than the original. I do size up, and I do always wear socks as I feel my toe nails get stuck without socks - weird - but good to know if you are new to Crocs. I also find keepint them in "sport mode" -the straps around the heel - works for a better fit. The glitter is great as it does not transfer or fall off. Crocs are the answer to my plantar fasciitis issues. I know they don't work for some people, but for me, they are great!

reviews.title: 13 April, 2026
reviews.body: Crocs Baya are a crock of trash I have purchased crocs for years to wear while I cut grass and other of my property tasks. I had an old pair of Baya that I got 3 years out of and were needing to be replaced. I decided to purchase a new pair from crocs.com. I could tell they were not as soft as the last pair immediately! I figured well I'm sure they'll break in because they are new (Even though they never needed break in prior). I just got done wearing the new ones to cut my grass. Well, all I can say is my feet are rubbed raw in about 7 different spots!! Wow, I did not see this one coming. All I can say is I will not be continuing with crocs from now on. I can't return them because they are used and have green grass stains on them. I am completely disappointed:(

reviews.title: 11 November, 2024
reviews.body: I will not buy this product again I ordered two pairs of Crocs clogs for my daughter-in-law during a sale, order date was June 22, 2024. The clogs did not fit her but they fit my grandson, so she gave them to him. He started using one pair but recently left it outside, in desert heat for a few days as outdoor shoes. The shoes shrank in size so they no longer fit. I called Crocs and was told the time for return or replacement had passed, and the best they could do for me was to send me a 20% off coupon with free shipping, which they did. However, that does not make up for buying a pair of shoes that only lasted 4 and 2/3 months. I have sent Crocs to other relatives that live in desert areas and never had this happen. Nowhere on the shoe description did I see a warning that this could happen.I am disappointed with Crocs and will hesitate to buy their shoes in the future.

I decided to try a W10 and they are a bit big in length and width, so I know I could have gone with my normal size. Super comfy and I truly the croc brand for cheap!

reviews.title: Great purchase

I love the details like now it says “Crocs” across the side of the toe area and the swoopy textural designs, it’s not just a smooth shoe it has what looks like swoops in frosting on the top. I also love the color cobblestone. Of course they’re extra comfortable. Overall very happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Cool Crocs
reviews.body: I love these new ones they are super comfortable for me to wear in my home. I have tile floors and they help support my feet,legs and back! Plus they were a great price!

The first pair I ordered were a seven but when I got them, they was way too big for me so I took him back to the store and got a refund and then I seen that you all had the crocs on sale again so I re-ordered me a pair and size 6 they’re just beautiful.

reviews.title: Softness, arch support, color, easy on/off…
reviews.body: My “cobalt blue” Crocs are lightweight, comfortable, and convertible. I usually just slip into them on my way out the door. I do use heel strap for safety when I’m going to be using an escalator. This intense blue is my favorite color, and lives up to the online Walmart picture. I’m going to get them in bright pink next summer.
Good quality, I got pink in M6/W8 and they are slightly big on the front of my foot but they fit perfectly in the back. 👍💗💗 P.S. *Don’t mind the charms…

reviews.title: If you wear a size 13, don't order!
reviews.body: If you are really a size 13, DO NOT order Crocs. I am a size 13. I ordered to replace my size 13 crocs I bought just 2 years ago. My old Croc fit perfectly and unlike so many shoes today, were actually a size 13. Guess what? Not true today. My new Crocs arrived and are maybe a size 12. They still say 13 on the bottom, but in a way to save 3 cents, Crocs made the shoes a much shorter and more narrow. Held them up againt my old pair and it looks like I have a size 12 narrow. So sad, but there are almost no companies anymore selling REAL size 13s!

reviews.title: Order a size up.
reviews.body: Absolutely love these! Beautiful colors and super comfy! I normally wear women’s size 10 and ordered size 11 and it’s a perfect fit not too small and not to big!

reviews.title: Try them you may like them!
reviews.body: I’ve never been a fan of crocs however I’ve bought plenty of them for my grandson. I saw these on Walmarts deal days and decided to go I’ve them a try. They are comfortable but walking a long time in them I would recommend wearing some socks (I prefer no show socks).

reviews.title: Great Purchased, reasonable price
reviews.body: I purchased yellow crocs, run a little big, I love them, soft, comfortable walking, I liked them so much I purchased another pair Colbalt blue, and a smaller size. great purchase, I would recommend to a friend.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.body: I love these crocs . I’ve been looking for them for months, but I couldn’t find my size. Then someone told me to order them in unisex because I wear a 8 1/2 they only come in 9 so I ordered a 7 in men size and they fit perfectly and feels great! I love them

reviews.title: I have stayed away from these for years, because i was not crazy about the way they looked. But lately I have been having pain in my feet, and a friend recommemded I try a pair. OMG!! They are so comfortable. My feet have not hurt all day today 😊
reviews.body: I have stayed away from these for years, because i was not crazy about the way they looked. But lately I have been having pain in my feet, and a friend recommemded I try a pair. OMG!! They are so comfortable. My feet have not hurt all day today 😊

reviews.title: Get them! But size up
reviews.body: I’ve worn lots of crocs for years now but this was my first pair of Baya. I wanted them primarily for the marble color and it did not disappoint. They’re gorgeous! I deducted one star because the sizing is so inconsistent compared to classic crocs, but maybe I shouldn’t deduct a star because that’s just the way the Baya are made. The fit is more snug all the way around and the width is definitely more narrow so if you have wide feet like me, you may want to size up if you prefer the roomie comfort of a classic croc. I’ve been wearing them a lot, and I’ve got used to the fit. I would actually say the fit works better for being active because it hugs your foot. I feel more secure walking to places and in stores wearing these shoes than my loose classic crocs. Hope this helps someone choose the right size … just get them!!

reviews.title: as described
reviews.body: ordered online they came w/o much wait time. so comfy and pretty. textured outside w/glitter. ordered the size I normally order in sneakers %26 they fit so well. have wide feed ordered a size 8 silver. they're my new fav! runs true to size. would highly recommend! ty

reviews.title: LOVE LOVE LOVE
reviews.body: Everything I’ve ever heard about CROCS is true … with the exception of them running small like it says on the Walmart site)I am usually a 9/9.5 so I started by ordering an 11 and they were way too big than I tried the 10 still too big. I felt like Goldilocks size 9 was just right !) after sizing issues these are the most comfy slide ever!! I have concrete flooring in my house so it’s kinda hard on the feet and the knees, but I can wear these around the house and it feels like I’m in shoe heaven already looking for my next pair plus all the little stitch charms make me a happy silly old lady :P

reviews.title: Size covers 2 US sizes
reviews.body: The US size is stamped on the bottom of shoe and the tags state sizing in EU, so the sizing is European converted to US. For example I wear women's US 11 to 11.5, and that's European size EU 42-43. EU sizing is gender neutral, so their 42 - 43 size applies for women US 11-12 AND men US 8-9. Because these Crocs are made to cover 2 sizes for either gender, they may run a little large or small depending where your US size is in the range. Mine have about an inch of space so I might have been able to go down a size but then they might be tight and I couldn't wear socks. So consider how tight you like the fit and whether you want to wear socks.

reviews.title: False Advertising
reviews.body: The product sent to us does not match the picture in the ad. The shoes in the picture have orange lined straps. The pair of shoes I received do not. It was that special feature of orange that I liked. The actual product and the ad do not match. That’s false advertising. I am very disappointed.

reviews.title: Great Buy!
reviews.body: Bought these as backup shoes for my daughter to wear to the ball field %26 back, but she has completely adopted them as her own on a daily basis! They’re durable, and we love that they’re easy to clean. Buying separate charms to give them a personal flair has been most fun.

reviews.title: Great Price compared to other websites.
reviews.body: I purchased the unisex size 4mens / 6women’s white crocs for my 11 yr old daughter. She normally wears a size 5 shoe. The size 4/6 unisex crocs are a tiny bit smaller than expected. They still fit well. Just a little snug when worn with socks on. Other than that no complaints at all. She loves them.

reviews.title: Sizing. Doesn't seem to be consistent.
reviews.body: I ordered my Normal size They were huge I sized down and they were almost too small. The topper was I had a coupon. I used on the first pair. So when I returned them for an exchange, they would not refund my coupons so I could use it on the second pair. I wasn't too happy about that because it wasn't my fault the sizing is off.

reviews.title: I Said I’d Never Do It
reviews.body: I said I’d never buy crocs for my son, but he wanted them, so I did. He loves them and wears them every chance he gets. He even wears them to school on days that he doesn’t have PE. If he’s happy, I’m happy.

reviews.body: The tie dye colors are beautiful! Bright and vibrant! They are very comfortable! I love wearing them working in the flower beds and mowing. Easy clean up! I’ve got a lot of compliments on the color of them.

reviews.body: I purchased these when they were 50% off and they are so cute and comfy, but not as tough as the pair I bought from the website. I think this may be rubber material and the other pair is silicone, so my feet squeak when I walk on tile. I bought 3 pairs though so it's not a deal breaker lol

reviews.title: Great Buy
reviews.body: Bought these for my husband who has a large foot and we have trouble finding as shoe to accommodate his extra wide foot. But these crocs fit very well. He loves them and we will buy again. Finding as shoe to accommodate his extra wide foot. But these crocs fit very well. He loves them and we will buy again.

I gave my step son the first pair and reorderd this time one whole shoe size down %26 could've went a shoe size and a half down actually but they are doable and really comfortable . Keeping it real its your call as to how loose or tight you want them but just keep in mind that they are larger by one shoe size for sure.

reviews.body: Great price purchasing through Walmart. However, occasionally you can find a sale on crocs website, and you could get it for a similar price.

reviews.title: I didn’t think I would wear these shoes except for pool and beach trips , but they are surprisingly comfortable ! I put them on now after work to alleviate " boot foot " from my ten hour days . Very surprised at how they don't irritate my callused feet .

reviews.title: The contour of the bottom inside
reviews.body: This is my second pair of crocs. My shoes can get muddy. They also get very wet I like being able to quickly rinse the shoes off. Cushioning is excellent. It’s nice to just slip them on—I don’t use the strap, but it’s nice to know it’s there. I walk the dog down pebbled alleys and these shoes don’t get many rocks in them compared to sandals. If I could change one thing, I would take a surgical blade and cut off part of the ridge on the bottom inside of the right shoe. It hits my pinky toe in the wrong spot.

reviews.title: Cushy crocs!
reviews.body: I bought these on sale ( 1/2 price) at beginning of summer. Bought mine, husband’s %26 a few of our grandsons a pair. (Get the cute decor buttons on Amazon ! They have thousands) These are so comfy and cute. Great when it’s raining, going to the pool or lake. Quick trips to the store. Love my crocs. Very cushy.

reviews.title: Autism and Crocs
reviews.body: My 8 year old autistic son refuse to wear anything that's not a croc since he has sensory issues and also hates socks on his feet, so crocs are always our go to! My son has a big foot and he's already grown from a 4 mens to a 5 mens within 6 months. I would say he has a wide foot and these fit him well.

reviews.title: 🐊 Unbelievable 🐊
reviews.body: Never thought I would purchase. Could not imagine they would be supportive, let alone even comfotable. Some close friends (almost 5yr old!) son told me " I should buy some, I would like them". I have seen him slip them on, flip them off, walk through through freshly cut grass, you name it. And he likes them Well myself several centuries older I gave em a shot. I could not have been more wrong! Very comfortable, supportive (arch), heel impact reduction and an almost massaging feeling when walking. I Thanked him and I'll Thank Crocs, great product! Will certainly purchase again!!!! Easy clean also!

reviews.title: Great Deal on Summer Essential Shoes.
reviews.body: if you are between sizes, order UP. I wear a 10medium or 9.5 wide ladies in regular shoes. I am in what they say is Croc sz 11 womens/9 mens. Fits well with or without socks. I like these a lot. Comfy and handy for camping...although army green may be hard to find outside the tent, whoops! Haha. Good price for Crocs.

reviews.title: Received Dirty Product
reviews.body: Unsure if these are dirty new crocs, or used returns, but mine came with a stain on the front. I'm all for selling returns at a discount, or warehouse deal, but not as new. When I investigated them, I noticed the bottom of the shoes had some sand or fine dirt. Bought two pairs, but might return them. I wear a 10.5 men, and my partner wears a 8 women. The male shoe ran big, and the female ran short.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.body: Im disappointed about the method used for coloring these crocs. It comes off fairly easily. Had i known before hand i don’t think id have bought them.

reviews.title: I Recommend Getting Your Regular Size In Shoes!
reviews.body: I love Crocs and I love my glitter Crocs that I just purchased from Walmart! They were on sale for a few days at Walmart while Amazon had their sale days so I saved about $20 on these Crocs! My only suggestion to anyone who is considering purchasing Crocs at Walmart is to buy the size you normally wear! I saw the comment on the Walmart App saying that these shoes run small and suggesting purchasers go up a size. I should have known better, but I ordered up a size as recommended and I regret it! I may wear them anyway in the fall and winter with socks!

reviews.title: The seller did not pay the full shipping cost.
reviews.body: I appreciate the items purchased, but the negative is that the shipper did not pay for the shipping cost, and I was left with paying the remaining fee. Even odder, shipping should have had free shipping with my WALMART subscription.

reviews.title: First of all order a size smaller than what you normally wear, second always make sure you buy a backup if you are on your feet all day because they wear out fast. The Baya is very comfortable when you first buy it, but once it wears down, it is like you are walking on the ground with no support. So enjoy the comfort while it lasts. I got it on sale for $35 other wise $50 is too expensive and crocs.com also has good sales where you can buy 2 for $50.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.body: If you are ordering these and your men's shoe size is 8-1/2 order size 8 not 9, I ordered size 9 first, I had a easy return to Wal-Mart %26 ordered size 8. They fit a little loose but they are extremely comfortable, no pinched toes, I can even wear thermal socks, with them, I won't be trying them in the snow.

reviews.title: Comfortable, versatile and all weather footwear.
reviews.body: First new crocs I have purchased in more than 10 years and I am extremely satisfied with the fit and the color. They are a neuteal shade of beige with some white marbeling running throughout the color. They look wonderful with anything I choose to wear from beige to khaki, denim to black. Truly satisfied with this purchase.

reviews.title: I wear these mostly around the house or out into the yard, but I've also worn them to my neighbor's. I love to wear brightly-colored caftans, and I like to buy Crocs to match, especially when I find a good sale. These are comfortable, and I love the quirky hot pink color.

reviews.title: Comfy Crocs
reviews.body: The Baya crocs are sightly larger than a typical classic croc. The sheinking method would work to adjust accordingly. It isnt large enough to go down a size though so I would stay with your usual crocs size especially if you have wider feet. Wearing socks or adding insoles(which I did add insoles until the nubs wear down-- as seen in photos) will make them feel smaller so buy according to how you plan on wearing them. As for the color, it leans more towards orange red depending on the lighting in the room. +1 image

reviews.title: Crocs at a great deal
reviews.body: I was excited to get these Crocs. They are a nice crisp light blue color. They almost look white. They look amazing with my Dodgers charms in them. They are comfortable and they arrive at a very reasonable time. I would purchase them again, or at least more colors.

reviews.title: Crocs white unisex sandals
reviews.body: They are so comfortable. I love these so much, I am going to order another pair. I ordered 2 different styles for my great grand-daughter also!!

reviews.title: confused customer
reviews.body: The fact that it snapped 12 minutes after my son wearing it and then he went to take it off very cheap cheesy plastic that's put in it and I noticed this particular crock was branded from Mexico the last pair of Crocs I got my son were from China I don't know if that's the difference but that's the only thing I noticed in the difference The shoes themselves look pretty cool and he loved them he was heartbroken when he couldn't keep them and wear them and then on top of it all I did a return for a new pair and for some reason I only got the return which yes I got my money back but this is frustrating because I now have to contact once again.

reviews.title: Horrible service
reviews.body: I ordered the wrong size! I was on the phone with customer service for at least 30 minutes to make a return and order the correct size! I was told to keep the shoe and I would receive the correct size a couple of days later! When I received the replacement shoe it was exactly the same size I had received the first time! Very disappointed!

reviews.title: Once I got the right size I was happy. I originally ordered a size that turned out to be too big. I went through the return application and another pair was sent quickly, however the returns department didn’t read my note and sent the same size again! I decided to reorder not linked to a return and got my correct size. I then returned both large pairs to the local store and got credit. I like the shoes and the color!

I’m 82 and the nonslip is very important to avoid falls. A few days later I bought a pair of mineral blue Crocs and love them just as much. I bought one size down and they fit perfectly.

reviews.title: I hated Crocs for so long but was WRONG!
reviews.body: These are so comfortable and easy to use. I highly recommend them, I would have foot pain walking in my home (all hardwood floors and tile). With these, I no longer have this issue. I tried various slippers, etc before buying these. I paid around $40 for them, worth every penny!! Highly recommend

reviews.title: I have been wearing crocs for over 20 years probably. I wear a size 8. They have always fit great. I don’t know what they are doing there now, but they do not fit. They say they are unisex. I don’t know if they’ve always been unisex, but they gear them towards a man’s foot now not a woman’s they are so wide they will not stay on my foot. So I guess after all this time, I’ll have to stop wearing them and that sucks.

reviews.title: Love them!!
reviews.body: I love these!! I was hesitant at first not thinking I’d like them or they would hurt my feet but I really do love them! I wear socks with mine and use them for house shoes/ slippers. They are comfortable and give me good stability when I stand up and walk. They have good toe box room and don’t pinch your toes. I’m going to order another pair in a nice fun color. I got purple and I love the pop of color so I’ll get about fun color.🌹

reviews.title: Now that’s a croc
reviews.body: Overall, I'm really pleased with my purchase. They might not be the flashiest shoes out there, but sometimes simple and comfortable is really all you need. If you’re looking for something reliable for everyday wear, I definitely recommend giving them a try!

reviews.title: Great Deal on Crocs
reviews.body: Oh what a great deal. I sent these to my son’s family. They love them. I got the army green for them all.

My only problem i order a woman size 8 i should've got a 7 because the 8 is kind of too big but not bad. So if you order go a size down they fit big... Great price and they ar really croc's😃

reviews.title: Runs super wide and big size down for small feet
reviews.body: I contacted crocs after these were huge on me and they confirmed that these are the UNISEX men’s and women baya which are made to be very wide and “roomy” they run a size and a half large and are for wide feet. Narrow feet can’t fit these. I own lots of crocs and these are a size and a half bigger than the women’s six. If you don’t have large flat wide feet you’ll need to really size down. Don’t be scared because these are really big I promise. A 6 fits like a 7.5-8 measurement wise I measured when they came. The back strap is super wide too so they won’t stay on. I find that these aren’t as quality as the original crocs because they split apart at the word crocs see the reviews to see multiple people with broken shoes after a couple days. Idk why Walmart doesn’t have anything smaller than 6 which is really 7.5 almost at 8 for most colors. Crocs said anytime it says unisex it’s gonna run wide because men’s feet are wide and flat and honestly these do. Anyone who says otherwise has big feet and doesn’t know. Even check red d it croc site it has legit comparisons that show how much wider and bigger they are. Ultimately are they worth 50? No. They look goofy due to the huge wide size and shape. They’re just not it. Go with classic.

reviews.title: I ordered Cobblestone and got Khaki. Customer service department couldn’t help me out at all. Even through this wasn’t my fault. Very disappointed in the customer service rep.
reviews.body: I ordered Cobblestone and got Khaki. Customer service department couldn’t help me out at all. Even through this wasn’t my fault. Very disappointed in the customer service rep.

Weird- I have not had this problem before w/ Crocs/Baya. I have blue, black, latte, navy blue and marble. It must have been a weird glitch. +1 image

Total opposite of what I was anticipating. They are a bit on the pricey side. I'd buy again if they go on sale.

These shoes were far too tall %26 wide in the foot area, rendering them impossible for a female foot. I cannot speak to any other aspect of these shoes ; they were returned immediately. Thank goodness for easy returns!

reviews.title: So far so good!
reviews.body: The try on feels, looks good, hopefully the experience matches up! ✌🏾

reviews.title: Great job
reviews.body: I’m getting old and we just went from carpet to flooring so this vacuum has been perfect for me. It’s not too heavy and yet does an excellent job of flooring and furniture. I use maximum strength on the carpet we do have and it works great for that but does use up the battery faster. One person found this helpful

reviews.title: With Dyson Vacuuming is Not a Chore Anymore
reviews.body: I LOVE MY DYSON! I avoided buying one for so long because I thought it was too expensive. Plus, when Dyson vacuums came out, they were quite the trendy item to get. I bought this one from the Amazon Warehouse, like-new with an excellent price for me. First thing, when I vacuumed my carpet I noticed the fine dust particles in the canister. The vacuum was REALLY suctioning up the dirt!!! It's lightweight and easy to manage, the accessories are very versatile to use for using near the ceiling (spider webs), or under my bed. LOVE it that the joints allow the long beater brush attachment to extend under the bed. That's a solid winner for me! It's portable, small footprint (tucks away in a small closet), and the motor easily adapts for vacuuming the car too. So far the battery is holding the charge pretty well after extensive use. I'm very pleased with this purchase.

reviews.title: Best vacuum EVER!
reviews.body: This is my second one. My first one lasted me twenty years. Great suction, but the battery eventually kicked the bucket. This tool is NOT optional. I would never compromise with a cheap knock-off. The Dyson is worth every penny.

reviews.title: MAJOR DISAPPOINTMENT IN DYSON
reviews.body: Total waste of money. I should have paid attention to the 1-star reviews and given it a thorough workout before the return window of ONLY ONE MONTH expired. And my call to Dyson was fruitless. The "40 minute run time" is a joke, if not a flat-out lie. I'm lucky to get 15 minutes of run time out of it. And then it takes HOURS to charge. But hey, one benefit of the short run time is that my trigger finger can recover — you have to depress the trigger the whole time you are using it, which is painful — it doesn't just click on and off like MOST VACUUMS. The dust canister is a nightmare to remove from the handle/battery assembly, and right now I can't even get it back together. And it works well only on floors or very low-pile carpets. Forget about it if you have a deeper pile carpet. It just gets stuck in place to the carpet. Powerful suction, but otherwise useless, and in my opinion a piece of plastic garbage. I am stunned that a Dyson vacuum is THIS BAD, especially one that cost so much. I purchased this to replace another brand that was recalled. I have no idea why it was recalled, but my older cordless vacuum worked much better, the battery lasted much longer, took much less time to charge, and clicked on and off, so I did not have to hold the trigger in the whole time I was using it. Also, my previous vacuum had a battery that removed from the unit for charging. This Dyson battery is built into the handle/canister unit, so I can't even try ordering a replacement battery. Absolute waste of my money.

reviews.title: Be prepared to modify
reviews.body: I purchased this vacuum for my hair salon. I was looking for a cordless option, lightweight, and very powerful. I've had this vacuum for just over a month and here's the pros and cons. Pros. It REALLY sucks. It has a great suction to it, making vacuuming up rouge hair and dirt almost addictive. I like how it comes apart to empty the dust collection, and I really think it's designed to be lightweight- although I'll come back to that in the cons. I love the option to hang it on the wall for storage and charging(this is NOT a free standing vacuum)- will circle back to that in the cons as well! .It comes with 3 different attachment that are easy to change. They are on the smaller side, but honestly I like them for vacuuming out the furnace vent cover, or getting hair out of the salon chairs/dryer chairs. I also like to use it for a quick vacuum in the vehicles when they are looking gross. Now for the Cons. The biggest, most frustrating part of this vacuum is the dang battery life. Upon initial purchase, I fully charged the vacuum. I was very patient with making sure it was charged so I could get an idea of battery life. Boy was I so disappointed. The battery barely lasted for 1/4th of the salon. And I'm not vacuuming up piles of hair. This is for once a week use, maybe touchup on the waiting area use. I'm not dilly dallying around vacuuming. Ixm there to clean and move on woth my lifem The original battery is terrible. Fortunately they make battery adapters for RIDGED and Ryobi batteries. I purchased one for the RIDGED off of Ebay. With that i still have to use a HuGE battery for it, which adds to the weight, and now with the new battery adaptor it will not hang on the cute charging/storage hanger. The trigger is also one that has to be manually held, so their is some fatigue after doing the entire salon. With all of this being said, I do love it (with the adapter and large battery) for the salon. It does a great job, but please be ready to make some modifications if you do decide to purchase this vacuum.

reviews.title: Great vacuum! I now own two!
reviews.body: This is my second one of these to purchase. We have one for our main house and one for our guest house. It works great and the battery lasts long enough for me to clean what I need to clean - never had an issue with that. The roller brush doesn’t work on all rug types…just low profile rugs. That would be my only wish, is that I could roll that over any of my rugs…but it’s not a big deal as I mostly use this over my tile floors. Great vacuum for me and cleaning up after my 2 kids and 3 pets!

reviews.title: The only one for pet owners
reviews.body: This is my second Dyson in a different home; my first is a V6 that still works like new. I have tried all other vacuums; if you have dogs, nothing compares to Dyson's performance. I also have robots, but robots take a while to clean and need babysitting. With the Dyson, it is quick and easy. Do not waste your money; go for what works. As mentioned before, this is my second one, but the V6 I previously purchased is 10 years old, and I have replaced the battery once. This particular version has an exceptional attachment for hair removal that will remove even the most stubborn hair from surfaces. I carry my dog in the back of my car, and the hair sticks to the carpeted walls. I used this attachment to clean the wall as if I were cleaning a bare floor. The vacuum will not disappoint you. I can also use regular deodorant tablets on the filter to prevent foul odors.

reviews.title: Great Cordless but short battery life.
reviews.body: Click to play video I really love my Dyson. But two glaring mistakes stick out with this one. First, the battery dies FAST! We thought it was too fast and even had Dyson send us a replacement- nope. Just dies fast is all. You'll get about 30 minutes on reg power and about 15 on high. Then, it takes like 3 hours to charge. Second? The design of the wall hanger is weird. Every time we hang up to charge we have to really give it a good push and it's gotten to the point that tie cord is now permanently bent. Hopefully we dont meed to replace in a year. Other than that, the suction is SUPERIOR to anything else on the market, which is I guess what we pay for. So, I'm still happy I bought it, but a longer battery life and less charging time would definitely be helpful.

reviews.title: Great vacuum but know what you are getting into with the battery
reviews.body: The suction on this thing is genuinely impressive and it picks up pet hair without tangling which was the main thing I needed it for. It converts to a handheld really easily and the different attachments make it useful for more than just floors. The battery life is the one thing I wish was better because you get around 20 to 25 minutes on high power which is fine for a quick cleanup but not great for a full deep clean. Still overall a quality vacuum that is lightweight and easy to use and I have been happy with it.

reviews.title: Not the most user-friendly vacuum
reviews.body: I took off a star because I have to constantly hold the on button down whilst vacuuming (which gets tiring for these old fingers) It won't stand up on its own either. It has to lean on something...with it being so top heavy I've dropped this thing more times than I can count! For the price and for dyson I expected so much more.

reviews.title: Dyson vacuum
reviews.body: Product not what I expected. Vacuum is limited performance due the small size drum. Speed work excellent, vacuum is light , easy to dump out clogging.

reviews.title: I was shocked!
reviews.body: I got this vacuum as a gift and let me tell you, I am absolutely over the moon excited for a vacuum for the first time in my life! The night it appeared on my doorstep it was put to use as I zoomed around the house picking up dirt and dust. The attachments are a bonus in that I can even clean my car out! I actually enjoy vacuuming now and I never thought I would say that.

reviews.title: Great little vacuum.
reviews.body: I really enjoy this vacuum. I mounted it on the wall in my kitchen. Super easy to use. Doesn't the job well. Can get in small places. The attachments are great. Cleans my couch of pet hair effectively. I just miss having a vacuum that can pick up larger items is my only complaint.

reviews.title: Effortless Cleaning with Powerful Suction
reviews.body: The Dyson V8 Cordless Vacuum has been a game-changer in how I clean my space. It’s incredibly lightweight and easy to maneuver, making everyday cleaning feel a lot less like a chore. The cordless design adds a huge amount of convenience, no more wrestling with cords or dragging a heavy canister from room to room. Suction power is impressive for such a compact vacuum, especially on hard floors and low-pile rugs. It picks up dust, pet hair, and debris with ease. The included attachments are versatile and genuinely useful, especially the crevice tool and motorized brush head. Battery life is decent, around 30–40 minutes per charge depending on the mode, which is enough for a full clean in my apartment. For larger homes, the runtime might feel a bit limited, but for quick spot cleaning or regular maintenance, it works really well. Emptying the dustbin is simple and hygienic, and the overall build quality feels premium, as you’d expect from Dyson. It’s not cheap, but the performance and design justify the price if you’re looking for a high-quality, cordless cleaning solution.

reviews.title: Works great but battery is bad!
reviews.body: My daughter recommended this unit. I had my doubts but ordered one anyway. Wow! It works great! It’s darned expensive though. Also if you turn it on high the battery is dead in 7-8 minutes.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.body: Easy to use.

reviews.title: Machine small than bagel size
reviews.body: The bagel cutting took is ok but when you put your bagel in it might be higher than the cavity it fits into so you have to cut a portion that sticks above the top top part/top surface

reviews.title: Created to buy new batteries?
reviews.body: I'm giving a 3 because not so much the battery, but the LIFE of the battery. With Dyson being a high end sorta vacuum cleaner, I expected the battery to last longer. I purchased this vacuum in Dec 2024 and in Feb 2026, I have to get another rechargeable battery. I know, if you leave a battery connected to charge too long it wears down faster. Having said that, this Dyson is DESIGNED to be placed in the charging unit when not in use. Either redesign so it's not charging all the time, or engineer a better battery.

reviews.title: Awesome Dyson V8
reviews.body: Delivery was very timely. This is my fourth Dyson product and I absolutely love it. It is easy to use and the perfect size for me.

reviews.body: Best vacumn ever! Only downside is that I can to recharge it after vacuuming the upstairs and do the downstairs later.

They do however win the award for best use of cardboard in packing an item. I have never seen such intricate folds etc. I think the engineer spent more time on the packing when it should have been on the "use" directions.
