reviews.title: 3 May, 2023
reviews.body: Not any I can think of [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I bought a 4100 toothbrush and it broke under 2 months. I contacted Phillips and they sent me a replacement and were very helpful and polite. The metal shaft the brush head attaches too become loose and it would not vibrate anymore. 1 reply from Philips consumer care team - 3 years ago Hello There. Thank you for your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your Philips Sonicare 4100 toothbrush is not working as expected. If your brush head is loose, ensure that the brush head is attached correctly. Attach the brush head with the bristles in the same direction as the buttons. A small gap will remain between the handle and brush head as needed for vibration. Ensure that the bottom of the brush head and the area around the metal shaft are free of debris. You can clean it with lukewarm water or a soft cloth. Our toothbrushes are only compatible with Philips Sonicare brush heads; hence, please only use authentic Sonicare toothbrush heads. If it still does not vibrate, it may not be fully charged. We recommend charging it for at least 24 hours. Try using a different outlet to fully charge your toothbrush. A faulty power source connected to your charger may cause your toothbrush to not charge. If your toothbrush powers on and the battery light indicators are lit but there is no vibration, your toothbrush has internal damage. If none of these tips help. Please get in touch via Social Media. We’reavailable on Facebook (@Philips) and Twitter (@PhilipsCare).Don’t worry, if you don’t use Social Media, you can also reach out to us via the contact page: www.Philips.com/contact. Hope to speak to you soon. Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: Long-time Sonicare user; HATE "new" models! [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I've been using Sonicare electric toothbrushes since they first came out in the early 1990's. I've LOVED them, and used nothing else, for almost 30 years. But after recently buying two new models, and intensely disliking both, Sonicare is about to lose this customer to Oral B. My most recent purchase makes a high-pitched screeching sound most of the time (similar to tinnitus), which is utterly annoying. It's "smaller" than earlier models (not an attribute, in my opinion; I like a firm grasp on my toothbrush); and I'm not a fan of the new USB ports instead of a regular electrical plug. Bye, Sonicare. View less Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi, Thanks for reaching out to us regarding your Sonicare 4100 Series toothbrushes! Wow, thanks for using our Sonicare toothbrushes for the last 30 years, we are happy to hear that they have played a big part in your oral hygiene routine since the early 90's. What a shame that the two recent models that you have used are not holding up, we hope we can help improve your current brushing experience. Firstly, fully charge your current Sonicare for 24 hours with no interruptions. Check that the charger is not placed on a metal surface or close to other chargers, as this can interfere with the charging process. One fully charged, replace the brush head with a new Philips brush head and try again. We hope this helps! If the issue persists, please feel free to get in touch via social media. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. Alternatively, you can reach out to us via the contact page on our website www.philips.com/support. One of our colleagues will then try their best to help you further. Hope to speak to you soon! Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi, Thanks for reaching out to us regarding your Sonicare 4100 Series toothbrush. We are sorry to hear that your new toothbrush is not providing you with the same clean feeling as your previous model and hope we can help! This Philips Sonicare model comes with the EasyStart feature activated, which gently increases the power over the first 14 brushings. You can deactivate the feature by following these steps: 1: Put the handle on the plugged-in charger. 2: Press and hold the power on/off button while the handle remains on the charger. 3: Keep the power on/off button pressed until you hear a single short beep (after 3 seconds). 4: Release the power on/off button. - Triple tone of high-med-low means the EasyStart feature has been deactivated. The battery level indicator light will blink amber 1 time to confirm deactivation. We hope this helps! If you have any further questions, please feel free to get in touch via social media. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. Alternatively, you can reach out to us via the contact page on our website www.philips.com/support. reviews.title: No charger in box
reviews.body: Unless you have a USB charger in your bathroom (I don't), it is a rather useless product. No 120V charger provided. Manual refers to support, but I don't find a charger there either. It is not that you can use any USB charger, it needs to be a specific voltage. My phone charger is higher. Where do I get that? Also, can't use the old 120V charger from my old brush. Stupid. View less Review from philips.com reply from Supplier Response Hello, Thanks for reaching out to us here. Please note that your Sonicare can be charged with any safety approved adapter with input ratings of 100-240V. You can also charge your toothbrush in any USB port, such as the one of your laptop. reviews.title: Solid Electric Toothbrush
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This toothbrush does a great job cleaning teeth. It's light, sleek, and easy to use. The bristles are on the softer side and small. I like that this has a long battery life, a 2 minute shutoff, and a pressure sensor that let's you know if you're brushing too hard. An added bonus is that it has 2 intensity settings one of which is a lower setting for sensitive gums/teeth. My only quibble with this toothbrush is that while it's rechargeable, it doesn't come with a power adapter. Overall, a solid electric toothbrush! Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Toothbrush died completely after one month
reviews.body: I have used sonicare toothbrushes for many, many years. This one however died after one month of daily use. Review from philips.com reply from Supplier Response Hi Wilbur, Thank you for taking your time to leave this review. We are very sorry to hear that your Sonicare has stopped working, and would gladly see how we can help! We kindly ask you to reach out to us via one of our social media channels. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. Alternatively, you can reach out to us via the contact page on our website www.philips.com/support. One of our colleagues will then try their best to help you further. Hope to speak to you soon! Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

reviews.title: Excellent but no power adapter included
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Overall, this is an excellent electric toothbrush from an extremely reputable company. It gradually increases the vibration over the first 14 days, which is a great feature for those who are new to electric toothbrushes. The device is lightweight but feels solid in your hand. My dentist recommended an electric toothbrush for me years ago because I was brushing too hard, and it was causing damage to my gums. This brush makes it super easy to brush softly and let the brush do most of the work. It will even vibrate and beep as a warning if you happen to brush too hard. The 2-minute timer is perfect for me, as otherwise I tend to brush too quickly. The QuadPacer feature is actually very helpful and lets you know when it's time to move to the next section of your mouth. My only real complaint is that it does not come with a USB power adapter, so you have to buy one or find one laying around your house. It seems like a silly thing for Philips to be cheap on, especially since it's designed to just leave on the charger. A matching white adapter should be included. I also wish that it didn't automatically turn off after the 2-minutes are up. Sometimes I feel like I'm not quite done and would like to brush a little longer, but it shuts off automatically. It comes with one standard brush head in the package. Sonicare makes several types of brush heads, so I am looking forward to trying some of their other more specialized heads when I re-order more. Overall, this is a must have for good oral health and I wouldn't live without it. If you use this twice daily, along with flossing and a non-alcoholic mouthwash, you will be amazed at how good your oral health can be. I am no longer worried about visiting the dentist. I get easy check-ups every 6 months and it can save you a ton of money on dental bills in the long run! View less Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Great entry level model electric toothbrush
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This Sonicare 3100 is a great entry level toothbrush for those on a budget or wanting to just try out an electric toothbrush for the first time. This is a newer 3100 model that has 2 intensities and a Pressure sensor. It has an advertised 14 day battery life which is accurate but I'm unsure if this model uses a NiMH battery or a lithium ion battery. The charging stand works well and uses a USB connection for power, it does not include a USB power adapter. It does a great job at cleaning my teeth and gives me a "straight from the dentist's office" sensation. I prefer the stronger intensity but I can see where some folks with more sensitive teeth and gums would prefer the lower setting. It does such a good job that I'm now curious about the higher-end Sonicare models that claim even better cleaning performance than the 3x this model states. Itching for an upgrade to a more powerful model now. View less Review from philips.com

reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Great toothbrush. I was little sceptical in the beginning. But now it's been 2 weeks since I started using it and definitely can see the difference. My mouth is much cleaner and after every brush I feel like I finished my dentist appointment. It makes you feel so fresh and clean. The reason I like this product is first it is more reasonably priced, the bristles are not hard and it has your brushing time. The only thing i dislike is the charger typ. It comes with a USB cable only and I have to bring my toothbrush out every time to connect to the charger head. Planning to buy a charger head just for the toothbrush. Battery life is good and with 1 time charging it has stayed 2 weeks so far and with 2 times brushing. I received this product for free as a part of product test. View less +1 image Review from philips.com

You have made it thinner and cheaper. Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thanks for sharing your feedback with us. We are sorry to hear that you are not pleased with the performance of your Philips Sonicare Toothbrush. Please note that some Toothbrushes have the EasyStart feature activated by default. This feature causes your Toothbrush to increase its vibration level slowly after each brushing session. The increase in vibration will occur over the first fourteen sessions. If you want your Toothbrush to vibrate normally, we recommend turning off the EasyStart feature.  Also note that the mode selected impacts the vibration level on your Toothbrush. Some brushing modes are less powerful, for example, TongueCare and Sensitive. We recommend increasing the vibration by changing the brushing mode. Turn off your Toothbrush and press the mode/intensity button to choose the preferred mode. We hope this will improve your experience. However, if the issue still persists or you have any additional questions, please get in touch via Social Media. We’re available on Facebook (@Philips) and Twitter (@PhilipsCare). It works very well and my teeth always feel very clean after I brush and it isn't harsh on the gums. In theory, I like that it has two different modes, but I honestly didn't notice much of a difference between them other than a louder sound. I wish it had a third mode. One of the best things about this toothbrush is the great battery life, I haven't had to charge it nearly as often as I expected. I'm able to keep this on my bathroom countertop unplugged to save electricity. View less Review from philips.com

reviews.title: I love this toothbrush!
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I recieved this toothbrush last week and I can't praise it enough. It vibrates so strong but the bristles are pretty soft. It's a perfect combination. It's easy to clean and the charging station is very easy to set it on but sturdy enough not to topple over. I've noticed after using is that I don't have nearly as much build up on my floss that I get when using a standard toothbrush. Also I have an extremely small mouth and it's small enough to get into the back where I still have a couple wisdom teeth without hurting my jaw. I WILL be purchasing some more when needed for me but asap for my kids and husband as they have tried mine and want one if their own lololol View less Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: A Budget-Friendly Option with Basic Functionality [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Philips Sonic 4100 Series HX3681 is a straightforward electric toothbrush that offers a gentle cleaning experience. It's a good choice for those with sensitive gums or dental work, as the two-speed setting allows for a customized clean. Pros: * Affordable: It's a budget-friendly option that provides basic sonic cleaning. * Gentle: The low-speed setting is particularly gentle, making it suitable for those with sensitive gums or dental work. * Long Battery Life: The battery life is impressive, lasting around 3 weeks on a single charge. Cons: * Limited Cleaning Power: The brush and speed settings may struggle to remove stubborn stains, such as tea stains. * Slow Charging: Charging the toothbrush takes many hours, which can be inconvenient. Overall: The Philips Sonic 4100 Series HX3681 is a decent option for those who prioritize a gentle cleaning experience and a long-lasting battery. However, if you're looking for a toothbrush that can tackle stubborn stains and has a faster charging time, you may want to consider a higher-end model. View less Review from philips.com

I do not like the black with the white brush, think they should ship with the black brush to match the base. Also, I had to go out and get a converter to plug into the wall. Should come with one or make it a plug in. Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: Finally found the perfect toothbrush for my son [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I have a 12 year old son on the spectrum. It's always been a battle getting him to brush his teeth properly. The timer is so perfect. He has been brushing his teeth properly since we got the toothbrush. The vibration when he brushes too hard is great. After his last dental appointment he started brushing too hard so this has been a big help. He is keeping his teeth healthy and clean and mom can stop nagging . View less Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: Same Model Less Power? [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I purchased this as a replacement for my previous Sonicare which stopped working. Got model # off bottom of old one and purchased same. This one is smaller and has less power than previous. Very disappointed. Does not clean as well. Did something change? Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thanks for sharing your feedback with us. We are sorry to hear that you aren't pleased with the performance of the Philips Sonicare Toothbrush. Please note that some Toothbrushes have the EasyStart feature activated by default. This feature causes your Toothbrush to increase its vibration level slowly after each brushing session. The increase in vibration will occur over the first fourteen sessions. If you want your Toothbrush to vibrate normally, we recommend turning off the EasyStart feature. Also note that the mode selected impacts the vibration level on your Toothbrush. Some brushing modes are less powerful, for example, TongueCare and Sensitive. We recommend increasing the vibration by changing the brushing mode. Turn off your Toothbrush and press the mode/intensity button to choose the preferred mode. We hope this will improve your experience. However, if the issue still persists or you have any additional questions, please get in touch via Social Media. We’re available on Facebook (@Philips) and Twitter (@PhilipsCare). Don’t worry, if you don’t use Social Media, you can also reach out to us via the contact page: www.Philips.com/contact. Hope to speak to you soon. Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: Has declined in quality [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I have had Phillips previously, quality is not nearly as good. After brushing, I still have particles. Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thank you for sharing your review, and we're sorry to hear that the performance of your Philips Sonicare 4100 Series is not as expected. Please follow these instructions while brushing. Wet the bristles of the brush head. Apply a small amount of toothpaste (the size of a pea). Too much toothpaste will create excessive foam that will run down the handle. Place the bristles against your teeth at a 45° angle towards the gum line, and close your mouth around the brush head (to prevent spattering while brushing). Press the power button to start brushing. Apply light pressure and move the brush head slowly across the teeth in a small back and forth motion, allowing the brush to do the work. Continue this motion throughout your brushing cycle. Your toothbrush has a Quadpacer feature; you can divide your mouth into four sections. The Quadpacer will vibrate intermittently to tell you to move on to the next section. Clean your toothbrush after use by rinsing your brush head and bristles. Wipe the handle with a damp cloth. If these instructions do not help or if you need any other assistance, please reach out to us via social media. We are available on Facebook (@Philips) and X (@PhilipsCare). If you do not use social media, you can also reach us through the contact page: www.Philips.com/contact. Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: A Budget-Friendly Option with Basic Functionality [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The Philips Sonic 4100 Series HX3681 is a straightforward electric toothbrush that offers a gentle cleaning experience. It's a good choice for those with sensitive gums or dental work, as the two-speed setting allows for a customized clean. Pros: * Affordable: It's a budget-friendly option that provides basic sonic cleaning. * Gentle: The low-speed setting is particularly gentle, making it suitable for those with sensitive gums or dental work. * Long Battery Life: The battery life is impressive, lasting around 3 weeks on a single charge. Cons: * Limited Cleaning Power: The brush and speed settings may struggle to remove stubborn stains, such as tea stains. * Slow Charging: Charging the toothbrush takes many hours, which can be inconvenient. Overall: The Philips Sonic 4100 Series HX3681 is a decent option for those who prioritize a gentle cleaning experience and a long-lasting battery. However, if you're looking for a toothbrush that can tackle stubborn stains and has a faster charging time, you may want to consider a higher-end model. View less Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Consistently going down in quality
reviews.body: In the last few years I had 3 of these brushes, each year the model gets “updated” , it gets smaller, slimmer, more difficult to hold, and the latest model is slim and very slippery, also now it comes with usb charger, and who has usb outlet in their bathroom. Review from philips.com reply from Supplier Response Hi, Thanks for taking the time to leave your feedback. We're sorry to hear you're not pleased with the new design of our Sonicare toothbrush models. As for the USB charger, Philips has made the decision to include the cable without the wall adapter, as we are currently trying to reduce the amount of plastic production in order to help our planet. You can either use a wall adapter you already own, or plug the USB into your phone´s charger in order to use only one adapter and help us continue our goal. If you have any further questions, please feel free to get in touch via social media. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. reviews.title: Lasted a little over a year
reviews.body: This toothbrush started turning itself on after about 14 months of having it. It would start buzzing in the middle of the night and often there was no way to turn it off. I would have to hide it in a drawer and pray for its death...or the death of the battery. I can't believe I've been dealing with this for two months. It needs to go in the garbage. This product should definitely last longer. The rubber over the button is also coming off. It's just poorly made. I always wipe it down after use, etc. View less Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thank you for sharing your review with us. We are sorry to hear about your experience with the Philips Sonicare 4100 Series Sonic Electric Toothbrush. We would like to inform you that all our Sonicare products come with a 2-year warranty. You can request a toothbrush exchange under warranty online here: https://philips-us.infotip-rts.com/Home.xhtml?&Page=ServicePg1&%20NoFefCheck=1 &Producer=philips&retailer=Philipssocial If you have any additional questions, please get in touch via Social Media. reviews.title: On Button failed
reviews.body: Had their Diamond toothbrush - failed. Bought this one - failed. Both lasted just a year to 15 months. I like their toothbrushes - but the quality is just so bad for the money we pay! This one probably would have worked for much longer - if not the rubber on the on button would have dissolved and cause the on button to fail. How ridiculous! You guys saved maybe a penny on the rubber on an otherwise good toothbrush. I am really upset about such arrogance and saving for the sake of saving, not with the customer in mind. Well, forget it. We - the customers - do not count anyhow. View less Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi Nala, Thanks for taking the time to share your review regarding the Philips Sonicare Toothbrush. Your feedback is invaluable to us in our continuous efforts to improve our products. We are sorry to hear about your experience with the toothbrush. For assistance, please get in touch via Social Media. We’re available on Facebook (@Philips) and X. reviews.body: Don't buy! [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The quality of the Sonicare brand isn't anywhere near what it once was. I had purchased a new 4100, a lower end model to be sure, since the one I had bought around 2020 didn't disappoint. The moment I charged it up and turned it on I knew that the device had been significantly downgraded. It was like brushing my teeth with a toy. I bumped it up to full power, but it was still limping along. Needless to say I returned it. My husband did some surgery on my original 4100 and replaced the battery (not for the faint of heart), but my teeth and I are much happier. reviews.body: does not have intensity , [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] seems like just making noise in the mouth not cleaning teeth, not enough power , I had different model before it was good of course it was expensive. Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi, Thanks for your review regarding our Sonicare 4100 Series Toothbrush. We are sorry to hear that your new toothbrush is not as powerful as expected, and we hope we can improve your next brushing session! Kindly make sure that the handle has been fully charged for 24 hours with no interruptions. Check that the charger is not placed on a metal surface, or close to other chargers as this can interfere with the charging process. If the issue persists, check if the EasyStart feature is still active. The EasyStart feature gently increases the power over the first 14 brushings to help you get used to the brushing with the Philips Sonicare. You can follow these steps to deactivate the feature: 1: Put the handle on the plugged-in charger. 2: Press and hold the power on/off button while the handle remains on the charger. 3: Keep the power on/off button pressed until you hear a single short beep (after 3 seconds). 4: Release the power on/off button- - Triple tone of low-med-high means the EasyStart feature has been activated. The battery level indicator light will also blink green 2 times to confirm activation. - Triple tone of high-med-low means the EasyStart feature has been deactivated. The battery level indicator light will blink amber 1 time to confirm deactivation. If you have any further questions, please feel free to get in touch via social media. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. Alternatively, you can reach out to us via the contact page on our website www.philips.com/support. One of our colleagues will then try their best to help you further. Hope to speak to you soon! Kind regards,

Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thank you for sharing your feedback on our product for Philips Sonicare 4100 Series. In regards to the toothbrush adapter, we want to let you know that our product team has matched the best design that is consistent across the globe. However, we get your point and will definitely share your feedback with our product development team. Regarding the sensation of the electric toothbrush this is not the experience we wish you to have. As you find the toothbrush to be too intense or uncomfortable, we recommend trying few troubleshooting steps. Some electric toothbrushes offer multiple intensity levels. You can try starting with a lower setting to see if it provides a more comfortable brushing experience. If the sensation is too harsh, switching to a softer brush head can help reduce the intensity while still providing effective cleaning. Electric toothbrushes are designed to do the work for you, so there's no need to apply excessive pressure. Try using a lighter touch and let the brush do the cleaning. reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I will start off by saying that my teeth feel so clean after using this. I have used other electric toothbrushes and they have nothing on this one. I like that there are 2 different speeds to choose from. Charging is super easy, just set it on the base and it will charge. The only issue I have os that it does not come with a charging block, you need your own USB charger. Also, it does beep to let you know that it is charging, which is great. However, it will randomly beed loudly throughout the day and night, so that can get frustrating. I just choose to not charge it at night. Other than that, the toothbrush is great and I will continue to use it. Review from philips.com

reviews.title: Superior Clean
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] I received this product to try for free. I have used 2 brands of electric toothbrush and I have used manual toothbrushing a lot in my life. This is one of the most affordable, yet effective toothbrushes I have used yet. My teeth have felt so clean and can even tell a difference when flossing that there isn't as much left behind. I would recommend this to everyone I know. View less Review from philips.com

Review from philips.com reply from Philips consumer care Hi there, Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We're sorry to hear about your experience with the Philips Sonicare toothbrush. We recommend you turn off your toothbrush, remove the brush head, and grab the metal shaft. If it feels wobbly, please reach out to us through our social media channels so that we can assist you further. If the metal shaft feels solid, please check to see if the easy start function is on. If it's on, switch off the easy start function. Additionally, if you haven't charged your toothbrush in a week, we recommend charging it for 8 hours. If the issue still persists, please contact us via social media. We’re available on Facebook (@Philips) and Twitter (@PhilipsCare). Don’t worry, if you don’t use social media, you can also reach out to us via the contact page: www.Philips.com/contact.    Hope to speak to you soon. Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care.

reviews.title: Seller Verified Purchase
reviews.body: does not have intensity , [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] seems like just making noise in the mouth not cleaning teeth, not enough power , I had different model before it was good of course it was expensive. Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi, Thanks for your review regarding our Sonicare 4100 Series Toothbrush. We are sorry to hear that your new toothbrush is not as powerful as expected, and we hope we can improve your next brushing session! Kindly make sure that the handle has been fully charged for 24 hours with no interruptions. Check that the charger is not placed on a metal surface, or close to other chargers as this can interfere with the charging process. If the issue persists, check if the EasyStart feature is still active. The EasyStart feature gently increases the power over the first 14 brushings to help you get used to the brushing with the Philips Sonicare. You can follow these steps to deactivate the feature: 1: Put the handle on the plugged-in charger. 2: Press and hold the power on/off button while the handle remains on the charger. 3: Keep the power on/off button pressed until you hear a single short beep (after 3 seconds). 4: Release the power on/off button- - Triple tone of low-med-high means the EasyStart feature has been activated. The battery level indicator light will also blink green 2 times to confirm activation. - Triple tone of high-med-low means the EasyStart feature has been deactivated. The battery level indicator light will blink amber 1 time to confirm deactivation. If you have any further questions, please feel free to get in touch via social media. We’re available 24/7 on Facebook and Twitter. Alternatively, you can reach out to us via the contact page on our website www.philips.com/support. One of our colleagues will then try their best to help you further. Hope to speak to you soon! Kind regards,

reviews.body: I don't like this electric toothbrush [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] The product requires an adapter (can't simply plug it into an outlet)! I do not like the sensation of the electric toothbrush at all. Review from philips.com reply from Philips Consumer Care Hi there, Thank you for sharing your feedback on our product for Philips Sonicare 4100 Series. In regards to the toothbrush adapter, we want to let you know that our product team has matched the best design that is consistent across the globe. However, we get your point and will definitely share your feedback with our product development team. Regarding the sensation of the electric toothbrush this is not the experience we wish you to have. As you find the toothbrush to be too intense or uncomfortable, we recommend trying few troubleshooting steps. Some electric toothbrushes offer multiple intensity levels. You can try starting with a lower setting to see if it provides a more comfortable brushing experience. If the sensation is too harsh, switching to a softer brush head can help reduce the intensity while still providing effective cleaning. Electric toothbrushes are designed to do the work for you, so there's no need to apply excessive pressure. Try using a lighter touch and let the brush do the cleaning. If you have any additional questions, please get in touch via Social Media. We're available on Facebook (@Philips) and Twitter (@PhilipsCare). Don't worry, if you don't use Social Media, you can also reach out to us via the contact page: www.Philips.com/contact. Hope to speak to you soon! Kind regards, Philips Consumer Care

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Good tasting bar with cleaner ingredients
reviews.body: Great vanilla almond flavor! Travels well, decent value. Clean ish ingredients outside of the “natural flavors”. Holds quality taste and avoids being stale well. Texture is super sticky so have gum or floss handy.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Now in light blue flavor!
reviews.body: These are my favorite non-chocolate RX bars. Chocolate is great but a little mind-clouding. These have all the nutritional synergy of RX bars and a great light slightly fruity flavor that I really like.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Great Energy Bar
reviews.body: These Vanilla Almond energy bars from RXBARS are my favorites of all the flavors. The dates make them super sweet, maybe too sweet (I'd like more nuts and egg whites), but they make a healthy lunch if you are out and about and can't stop for a real meal.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Great Tasting
reviews.body: These bars are yummy and a bit addicting :-) They are chewy and some are sticky (not dry) and very good tasting. Each bar has 200 cals and they are filling, with really good, healthy ingredients. I cut them up and keep them in a container at my desk, and nosh on them throughout the day.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: A simple protein bar that is gentle on my stomach
reviews.body: Just what my stomach needs. Simple ingredients, not too high in fiber, keeps you feeling full, Tastes good, and the right kind of gentle protein for someone with my stomach issues. I just wish it had more protein in it.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Taste great
reviews.body: These are really good and have 3-4 ingredients I had one in a hot backpack and it didn’t melt it was still really good to eat. I liked the nuts in it. It’s sticky so I had to drink water with it and after but it’s a tasty bar. Will buy these and the other flavors again.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Good protein boost.
reviews.body: Good protein boost! Chewy and sweet enough to satisfy tastebuds.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: RXBAR Knows How to Make a Great Bar
reviews.body: RX Bars are just my favorite for their reputation in having tasty and clean ingredients with a pretty decent amount of protein. I've been eating one every morning and find that they do a great job keeping me full. This one has a wonderfully nutty flavor that balances quite well with the vanilla. They're slightly chewy and very satisfying. Love these bars so much!

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Delicious protein bars
reviews.body: This brand of protein bars is one of the best in my opinion. All natural ingredients without extra junk. This is by far my favorite flavor. You should like chewy type protein bars they are not crunchy.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Good vanilla flavor

reviews.body: These bars are great for the short list of natural ingredients and the nutritional makeup. They're consistently fresh and have a nice chewy texture. The main downside is that they stick to your teeth.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Simple ingredients with no fillers, gums or stabilizers - just real food.
reviews.body: Most bars have a long list of ingredients and additives and are loaded with sugar. These are made from whole foods - no junk. They're as simple as you can get in a nutrition bar. I won't buy any other bars.

Yes, these do get stuck to your teeth and are a bit chewy, but it's nothing your natural saliva or some water can't deal with.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Sugar
reviews.body: Although these are marketed as some of the healthier protein bars I think the marketing is deceptive because it makes it appear that the ingredients that you see on the label are all that’s in there. However, when you look at the fine print of the ingredients, there are more sugars than anything else and even though it’s “natural“ sugar like honey coconut sugar it’s still 22% total sugars. They aren’t that great frankly and pretty small for 220 calories. And what are natural flavors not disclosed. One person found this helpful

reviews.title: Not recommended for people on very limited budget but a good product
reviews.body: The vanilla Rx Bar is my personal favorite. Even so, I still hesitate to purchase them because of the high price for such a small serving. They do, however, meet my dairy free & gluten free needs which very few (with decent flavor/texture) protein bars do. They are healthy and substantial enough to keep you going a few hours but I would not recommend them to regularly replace a meal more than for the occasional quick fill-the-void. They do not meet a wide variety of nutritional requirements for frequent eating.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Ridiculously good!
reviews.body: Wow! I sort of don’t want to review, they might become too popular and not be in stock when I want to order. No kidding. Open the package and before you even taste you get hit with a wonderful aroma of vanilla. (Candles should smell this good). The consistency is not gooey or hard, firm and moist. The flavor is a great array of flavors. Easy to taste the vanilla, not overpowering and a few nice fresh almonds and not too sweet. It’s substantial enough to fill especially for a snack, I eat it for my breakfast. Grab and go, easy! For a snack it would easily satisfy, almost like a healthy candy bar. Try this flavor, you won’t regret your purchase and have them sit in your cupboard untouched.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Tired of Receiving Old Stock with rancid nuts from Amazon
reviews.body: I love Vanilla Rx bars, but I’m now reluctant to order Rx bars from Amazon as I’ve repeatedly received poor quality bars with an off-flavor and rancid nuts. I initially thought it was a one-off situation, but when it recurred, I realized there is a larger problem. i don’t know whether Rx is sending Amazon bad product or if it’s shipped/stored in a poor environment. The last batch had an Best By date of June 8, 2023 so it doesn’t make sense why the product hasn’t been fresh. I’m disabled and hate hassling with returning products. Until I am reassured the inventory is fresh, I will not order Rx bars from Amazon. Please look at your QC and fix this problem. I live in SE MN. Note the low stars are to call attention to the problem. Normally, I would give fresh vanilla Rx bars 5 stars. 2/14/24 Update: was hoping problem resolved, but found out that others are receiving stale RX bars! Also, ordered vanilla almond butter in jar and it gas been discontinued. Decided to make dupe RX recipes at home with dried egg whites, nuts, medjool dates, nuts, honey… fresh and cheaper.

reviews.title: Good idea, not a good design for my feet

These just slide right off and don’t seem designed to stay on my feet - they are straight across the toes but my toes are angled so my small toe barely fits inside the sock. The metatarsal pad ends up under the toes and not in the right spot to help with my Morton’s neuroma. Good idea, bad design. Will have to return.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: Updated. Nutritious, but sticky candy, and the only flavor seems to be salt. Better out there.
reviews.body: Update 8-2025, maybe a few years later — hoped to love these and tried them (again … forgot we bought these and thought they were bland. Forgettable). Still mostly salty-sweet, not much flavor. Dental health problems now, and now we think they are tough to chew and swallow, and they stick to and suction teeth. Can’t eat them anymore unless we can find a way to soften them in microwave. Larabar makes vegan date-fruit-nut bars like these, but without egg or unneeded flavorings, and less salt. They are softer, less sticky, easier to chew and swallow, with softer-smaller nut pieces (cashew, not peanut, which were hard). They are smaller and have less protein without the eggs, but also way less expensive, with simpler, whole ingredients that are food not candy, and have good flavor without any unneeded added flavorings or so much salt. And they are EBT eligible. Original review — Very nutritious, softly chewy. But the only flavor seems to be salt, but my sense of smell-taste sometimes goes funny, but not usually for a whole box of anything. But maybe you will find this tastier. There is a glossy, oily coating that keeps it from sticking to the wrapper, but what is it? Nothing in ingredients list.

reviews.product_name: RX Bar Vanilla Almond Protein Bars
reviews.title: 3 March, 2020
reviews.body: Underwhelmed I'm a HUGE fan of vanilla just about everything. These bars don't really taste a whole lot like vanilla. They definitely don't smell like vanilla very much & my box full was delivered warm (it's already into the 80s in my area) so I was really looking forward to a very vanilla bar. Shipping took nearly 10 days! To wait that long wasn't worth all the hype surrounding the bar & I wonder the validity to the reviews. Again, I'm a huge lover of just about all things vanilla & while these bars DO taste good, they're not great. They will be good for my work in the construction field as there isn't any chocolate in these to melt all over the package & eventually make a mess on me as I try to eat a few bites at a tome in between working. These bars seem to have a very salty aftertaste like the dark chocolate sea salt does, possibly covering for a lack of actual flavor. For all the hype, I'm definitely disappointed in the underwhelming vanilla flavor. I may or may not buy these again but if I do, it will largely be due to no chocolate in the bar so no mess. Definitely won't be because I loved the flavor. The bar does tend to have more whole almonds in this one vs others which tend to have pieces or halves. I do like that & they have a really smooth, much less stick to your teeth texture than the other bars which I really like. It's almost like a fluffy texture. 1 star deduction for underwhelming flavor. I'd love to see more flavors without chocolate. I know, blasphemy.

Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Can.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle

reviews.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle
reviews.title: Sensational Ambience
reviews.body: Five Stars – This Yankee Candle Became the Heart of Our Home! I am genuinely thrilled with my recent Yankee Candle purchase. I chose the Lemon Lavender scent, and it has completely surpassed my expectations. From the moment I lit it, the fragrance filled my entire living space with a powerful, true-to-description aroma. It’s not subtle or weak-it’s a perfect, consistent scent that delivers on its promise. The notes of of a warm lemon lavender are beautifully balanced and create such a cozy, inviting atmosphere. The burn quality is exceptional. It’s clean, even, and lasts for hours upon hours, making it fantastic value for money. The jar itself is also lovely and looks so stylish on my mantel even when unlit. This candle has become my go-to for instantly lifting my mood, setting a relaxing scene, or making my home feel welcoming for guests. I will absolutely be repurchasing this fragrance and trying others from the collection. If you’re looking for a high-quality, long-lasting candle with incredible throw and beautiful presentation, look no further. Yankee Candle definitely delivers! Highly recommend.

reviews.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle
reviews.title: A classic scent that really classes up the place
reviews.body: My family has been buying this scent for decades. I guess it's become a tradition. Unfortunately, it's no secret to loyal customers like us that the quality of Yankee Candles has slowly been going down over the years. It began when they shut down many American factories and moved their base overseas. Gone are the days when one candle filled the entire house with fragrance and burned perfectly for hours on end. It might sound silly but it's heartbreaking for fans of the brand. This purchase was cheaper than the ones on their website and it arrived in one piece. But the throw of the scent is half of what it used to be and the wicks are drowning in the cheaper wax they now use. Rest in Peace, favorite brand of mine

reviews.title: 8 November, 2025
reviews.body: Absolutely not going to buy again Absolutely NO throw, no scent, nothing... I bought several fall scents, I love the fall, pumpkin, spicy scents. I have lit two of them and neither had any smell, throw at all. Really disappointed in the quality of Yankee candles. I don't think I will be back, which is a shame because I have been buying them for years. What happened,? 1 reply from Customer Care team - 6 months ago Hello. Thank you for sharing your feedback on our Spiced Pumpkin Large Tumbler Candle. We are truly sorry to hear that the fragrance did not meet your expectations and that your recent experience with Yankee Candle has been disappointing. We understand how frustrating it can be to anticipate the rich, fall scents you love and not have the candle deliver. Scent throw can be affected by factors such as room size, airflow, and burn time. To help maximize fragrance, we recommend: - Allowing the first burn to create a full wax pool that reaches the edges of the jar. - Keeping the wick trimmed to about ¼ inch for a steady, even flame. - Placing the candle in a smaller or enclosed space to help the scent concentrate. We value your loyalty and feedback, and we have shared your comments with our product team to help review fragrance performance and quality. If the tips above do not help, please reach out to us via our Contact Us form on our website. We’re available Mon.-Fri. 9am - 8pm Eastern Time. Thank you! Yankeecandle® Consumer Care

reviews.body: Inducing Happy Memories [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] While I have had many pleasant experiences with Yankee Candles over the years, there are a small number of scents that have stood such that I really regretted their eventual discontinuation. One of those extra special scents was "Over The River" - about ten years ago. Now I have found a worthy replacement! "Ocean Air" has a very similar fresh and clean - and ever so slightly sweet - scent. Even the soft pastel blue shade matches. I will definitely stock up on this one, before it is pulled from the market.

reviews.title: 10 May, 2021
reviews.body: smell like... [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] This candle is by far the best scented candle I have ever owned, haha! Get ready for your house to smell like your grandmother's/mother's baked cookies/pies/cakes, cause that's exactly what your house will be smelling like for hours! We clipped the wicks (as you are supposed to) to help from burning to quickly. After the wax starts to melt, you'll see these balls inside the wax, not sure if this is the hint of cinnamon we smell. The candles lid acts as a coaster, which I love because I despise having to find a place for the lids while my candles are burning! I'm also loving the new tall cylinder shape to this candle! As mentioned earlier, the scent is to die for! Perfect for those that want something that is simple/not too overpowering, but still smells up the house! All in all, I'm on love! My new go-to!

reviews.title: 16 September, 2025
reviews.body: Disappointing [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Didn’t like . I was really excited to get this candle because from past experience this candle brand is good. This was so disappointing no smell at all . I will light up my Goode Creek candles and immediately you can smell it throughout the whole house. I let this candle burn for an hour and nothing . 1 reply from Customer Care team - 8 months ago Hello! Thank you for your feedback! We’re very sorry to hear that your Midsummer's Night® Signature Large Tumbler didn’t provide the fragrance you expected. We understand how disappointing it can be when a favorite brand doesn’t meet your expectations. Here are a few tips to help maximize scent throw: 1. First Burn: Allow the wax to melt across the entire surface for 3–4 hours to create a full wax pool. 2. Wick Care: Keep the wick trimmed to about ⅛ inch before each burn for an even flame and optimal scent. 3. Room Size: Smaller rooms tend to hold fragrance better; in larger spaces, consider placing multiple candles or closer to seating areas. If you’d like stronger alternatives in the same fragrance family, you might enjoy: Balsam & Cedar® – rich and woodsy with a long-lasting throw. Black Coconut® – dark, bold, and highly fragrant. Midnight Jasmine® – floral, intense, and lingering. If you have any more questions, please reach out to us via LiveChat or https://www.yankeecandle.com/customer-service/contact-form and we will be happy to assist further. Thank you! Yankee Candle Consumer Care Team

reviews.body: Light airy vanilla gourmand candle Yankee candle, “vanilla cupcake” smells like a very light vanilla extract with a hint of buttercream icing and sprinkles. Smells like a more headache inducing maison margiela “afternoon delight” when it is unlit but that goes away when you light it. Overall like a 8/10. reviews.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle
reviews.title: On the porch performing like a SUPERSTAR!
reviews.body: A longtime fan of this scent, I had begun to find tarts a bit strong, and I was using them only for odor elimination. So I bought my 1st small jar in Lemon Lavender. For a little candle it is powerful, so I started using on my porch & it's perfect there. I can smell this baby jar in the great outdoors - and just the right amount for my nose. I had to stop my day to write because I came outside this morning to the lovely scent of lemon lavender. I forgot to put it out b4 retiring roughly 8 hours ago. There it was, in my lantern on the porch performing like a SUPERSTAR! I'll be buying more. Review from yankeecandle.com

reviews.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle
reviews.title: Excellent scent and great throw
reviews.body: [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Lemon Lavender is such a pleasure to burn. My house smells divine, and it is a perfect balance of both lemon and lavender. The throw goes far, but isn't overwhelming like some floral scents. It's my go to candle when friends stop over and I've had quite a few compliments. I truly love this scent!!! Review from yankeecandle.com

reviews.product_name: Yankee Candle Lemon Lavender Scented Candle
reviews.title: Pleasantly Surprised!
reviews.body: I grew up with lemon trees and homemade lemon aid so I am strongly familiar with the smell of lemons fresh off the tree. I am very familiar with lavender which comes in many varieties. You have to have a taste for the scent of pure lavender but this is more floral scented than the pungent smell of concentrated lavender. I also use lavender spray on linens as a natural calming sleep aide so not only do you get the sweet smell of fresh lemons off the tree with this candle but a perfect lavender scent for a touch of aromatherapy. I picked this up in store because I wanted to test the cold smell which sold me on this one. I couldn't picture the scent of this combination together but it didn't disappoint while burning either. Review from yankeecandle.com
